rules.name: Allow Known ECU Messages
rules.description: Allows messages from known ECU CAN IDs in the vehicle profile

rules.name: Detect Novel CAN ID
rules.description: Alerts when a CAN ID not in the baseline appears on the bus

alert.title: Novel CAN ID Detected
alert.description: A CAN ID ({can_id}) not present in the baseline was observed. This may indicate a new device on the bus.

rules.name: Detect Diagnostic Requests
rules.description: Alerts on ISO 15765-4 diagnostic request messages

alert.title: Diagnostic Request Detected
alert.description: A diagnostic request (CAN ID {can_id}) was detected. This may indicate a scan tool or unauthorised diagnostic access.

rules.name: Detect Diagnostic Responses
rules.description: Alerts on ISO 15765-4 diagnostic response messages

alert.title: Diagnostic Response Detected
alert.description: A diagnostic response (CAN ID {can_id}) was detected. An ECU is responding to diagnostic queries.

rules.name: Detect High Message Frequency
rules.description: Alerts when any CAN ID exceeds 100 messages per second

alert.title: High Message Rate Detected
alert.description: CAN ID {can_id} transmitted {count} messages in 1 second (limit: 100). This may indicate a bus flood or malfunctioning ECU.

rules.name: Detect Ultra-High Message Frequency
rules.description: Alerts when any CAN ID exceeds 500 messages per second (potential bus-off attack)

alert.title: Ultra-High Message Rate Detected
alert.description: CAN ID {can_id} transmitted {count} messages in 1 second (limit: 500). This may indicate a bus-off attack.

rules.name: Detect ECU Silence
rules.description: Alerts when a known ECU stops transmitting for 5 seconds

alert.title: ECU Silence Detected
alert.description: CAN ID {can_id} ({ecu_name}) has not transmitted for 5 seconds. The ECU may be offline or suppressed.

rules.name: Detect Extended Frame Usage
rules.description: Alerts when a 29-bit extended CAN ID is used on a bus that normally uses 11-bit IDs

alert.title: Extended CAN ID Detected
alert.description: A 29-bit extended CAN ID was detected on a bus that normally uses 11-bit IDs. This is unusual and may indicate tampering.

rules.name: Detect Remote Frame Usage
rules.description: Alerts on remote frame transmission (RTR bit set)

alert.title: Remote Frame Detected
alert.description: A remote frame (RTR) was detected. Remote frames are uncommon in normal operation and may indicate diagnostic activity.

rules.name: Detect DLC Mismatch
rules.description: Alerts when a CAN message has an unexpected data length code for its ID

alert.title: Unexpected DLC Detected
alert.description: CAN ID {can_id} has DLC {dlc} (expected {expected_dlc}). This may indicate malformed or tampered messages.

rules.name: Detect Global CAN ID Silence
rules.description: Alerts when the entire CAN bus is silent for 1 second

alert.title: CAN Bus Silent
alert.description: No CAN messages detected for 1 second. The bus may be in bus-off state or the gateway may have lost connection.
